title: Risk Record
description: Defines an identified AI system risk, threat level evaluation, and mitigation status mapping.

id.description: Unique identifier of the risk (e.g. rsk_1234).

ai_system_id.description: Identifier of the AI system affected (references sys_1234).

title.description: Short title or name of the risk (e.g. model_bias, prompt_leakage).

description.description: Detailed explanation of the risk scenario, potential impact, and context.

category.description: Category of risk (e.g. bias, privacy, security, transparency, safety).

severity.description: Potential impact scale if the risk scenario materializes.

likelihood.description: Estimated operational probability of the risk scenario occurring.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the risk register.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the risk record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the risk record was last modified.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
